mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces borrowing costs and stimulates equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% indicates tight labor market conditions that support corporate profit growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and employment signals strong supply-side momentum, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate earnings visibility.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and PAYEMS fails to produce positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of cases, or their correlation with SPX returns drops below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts above 1,400 thousand units signals renewed consumer demand, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through increased construction and related sector activity.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 1,400 thousand units.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in CPI inflation above 2.5% prompts central bank tightening expectations, which depresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production below its 12-month moving average indicates weakening supply-side activity, which drives negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through reduced corporate earnings forecasts.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO falls below its 12-month MA.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in real sales (RSAFS) above its 3-month average signals strong consumer demand, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in 50%+ of instances where RSAFS exceeds its 3-month average.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in unemployment and increase in payroll employment indicates a robust labor market, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through higher consumer spending and corporate profitability.
failure_condition: The joint decline in UNRATE and increase in PAYEMS fails to produce positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of cases, or their combined effect on SPX returns drops below 0.10.
